safeArrivalNotes: Keep arrival summaries calm and factual.
Do not infer danger from normal lateness without a stated reason.
weatherTimingNotes: Prefer indoor backup to cancellation when weather is merely annoying.
Call out short clear windows when departure timing matters.
overnightReviewNotes: Keep the night review brief, factual, and low-drama.
Separate resolved watch items from anything that still needs morning action.

baselineIncidents.headline: Package zone still uncalibrated for rain-side dropoffs
baselineIncidents.detail: Deliveries can land too close to the exposed side during rain.
baselineIncidents.recommended_action: Tune the porch delivery rule before the next wet-weather shipment.

baselineIncidents.headline: Garage freezer remains above baseline
baselineIncidents.detail: Temperature variance is still within safe range, but it is warmer than the household norm.
baselineIncidents.recommended_action: Recheck seal and airflow during the next workshop pass.
